title: kitty pride (2)
body:
- ))}}
    - ))}}
        - you do all this math to account for how that works
but it does because it does and your sampler can't filter the fuzz
every body abuzz lampin
sweat amping transmission
the sun dips the hips dig in
clan dancing the land listens
in the dark you can still feel the kicks hittin
clandestine that's how i been livin
blind since the first time i opened my eyes and the light shined in em
went mad before i saw red
cuz grayscale was sharp enough to draw blood
but i was always old enough to deconstruct
loved school when i was five but refused to marry it
best choice i ever made
toxic relationships keep gettin scarier
wanted me to believe my soul's a disease and i'm just a carrier
but it's a hammer born to break every barrier
lowkey i've always known i was a variant
so feeding me lines been a doomed experiment
i was fantastic fore i found space
now i can stretch like and you still tryin to put me in my place
good luck to ya
won't even see me i don't wanna show up to ya
stone faced and blazed whenever it's time to fuck wit ya
that's strange
you didn't know i controlled my own clock
i watch like cyclops
laser focused on my ops
always aware of the presents i've got
the future's a mystery
the difference between you and me is
i'm not hoping cable can undo all the misery
i touch what i'm able and the rest misses me
- ))}}
    - ))}}
        -
